full_text:
Sun Lü (Zizhi) 孫慮 (子智)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Lü (孫慮), styledZizhi (子智), was born in Wu. He was rebuked by Lu Xun for having a duck-fight shed in front of his hall. Sun Lü was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Sun Lü lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
